subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1919-12-25
subcodes.first_line: Today, inasmuch as it was the Feast of the Nativity of Christ, I proceeded, in accordance with the command of the Beauty, to visit certain Christian friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز چون عید ولادت حضرت مسیح بود دیدن بعضی دوستان مسیحی رفتم من بموجب امر جمال
subcodes.subjects: @fellowship with the wayward and ungodly, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all
